---
title: "First Synthesis LLC"
---

:::{.hero-section style="padding-top: 3rem; padding-bottom: 2rem;"}
:::{.lead}
First Synthesis LLC develops precise mathematical instruments. Our primary technology, the Monist Engine, pushes the boundaries of unstratified logic, combinatorial reduction, and formal verification against modern hardware limits.
:::
:::

::::{.feature-grid style="margin-top: 1rem;"}

:::{.feature-card style="grid-column: 1 / -1;"}
### Background & Expertise
We specialize in Rust, WGSL compute shaders, and the formal boundaries of self-referential logic. First Synth was engineered to solve the scaling crisis in deterministic execution, providing a rigid baseline for auditing probabilistic agents and infinitely recursive architectures.
:::

::::

<h2 style="margin-top: 4rem; margin-bottom: 2rem;">Secure Communications</h2>

::::{.feature-grid style="margin-top: 0;"}

:::{.feature-card}
### Enterprise & Commercial
For licensing inquiries, dedicated support, or custom NPU integration research regarding the Monist Engine.

<a href="#" class="btn-secondary" style="font-size: 0.85rem; display: inline-block; margin-top: 1rem;">Email Licensing</a>
:::
  
:::{.feature-card}
### Direct Channels

- **GitHub:** [@FirstSynthesis](#)
- **X (Twitter):** [@FirstSynth](#)
- **LinkedIn:** [First Synthesis LLC](#)
:::

::::
